creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Trivial request but it keeps the paper-trail a little more up-to-date.

Tripwire has relocated its homepage from
https://sourceforge.net/projects/tripwire/
which references 2.4.2.2
to the projects new homepage at 
https://github.com/Tripwire/tripwire-open-source
Latest link at
https://github.com/Tripwire/tripwire-open-source/releases/tag/2.4.3.7

I was perplexed that the FBSD package is 2.4.3.8, until I reviewed https://github.com/Tripwire/tripwire-open-source/pull/39.
Greatly appreciate your extra effort to fix the build issues, and including the important reference (to pull/39) in the Commit History.
